nodes.name: 圭亚那 (地区)
nodes.summary: 圭亚那 (地区)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联92种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、Black curassow、纯色秧鸡等92种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 彼得·博达尔特
nodes.summary: 彼得·博达尔特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括Sungrebe、禿䴉、Capped heron等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Pied water tyrant
nodes.summary: Pied water tyrant（Pied water tyrant，学名 Fluvicola pica），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于彼得·博达尔特、圭亚那 (地区)，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pied water tyrant (Fluvicola pica) is a small passerine bird in the tyrant flycatcher family. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, French Guiana, Guyana, Panama, Peru, Suriname, Trinidad, and Venezuela, as a vagrant to Ecuador and possibly other areas as well.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Sources agree that it is found in eastern Panama, from northern and central Colombia into northwestern Venezuela, on Trinidad, and from eastern Colombia across northern Venezuela, the Guianas, and to the mouth of the Amazon in extreme northern Brazil.Clements, J

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Neither mention the other Caribbean islands. The pied water tyrant primarily inhabits freshwater marshes and the margins of lakes and ponds; it also occurs in nearby grasslands and gardens

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Neither mention the other Caribbean islands. The pied water tyrant primarily inhabits freshwater marshes and the margins of lakes and ponds; it also occurs in nearby grasslands and gardens
